meta.display_name: Conflicting promotion and training hold for Raj Patel

task: Marcus Chen and Sarah Liu have sent conflicting requests about Raj Patel — check your inbox for both. Before flagging the conflict to each of them via Chat, reach out to Sarah Liu via Chat to confirm whether the hold applies specifically to the Leadership Development Program enrollment that Marcus requested, or to all development programs broadly. Also check with Marcus Chen via Chat to confirm whether the promotion and the program enrollment are dependent on each other or can be handled separately. Once you have both clarifications, flag the conflict to each of them via Chat so both understand the full situation including the other's position. Then email Raj a brief note that a development opportunity is being finalized and details are coming soon.

agent_profile_overrides.secret: I consider the promotion and the Leadership Development Program enrollment as a package deal — they must be processed together. The program enrollment is specifically meant to support Raj in the Lead Data Scientist role, so it doesn't make sense to do one without the other. Please make sure both Sarah and I are aware of any conflict so we can resolve it.

I want the hold to apply broadly to all role changes, title updates, and any development program enrollments for Raj — including the Leadership Development Program. The ongoing performance review could affect whether any of those actions are appropriate. I expect the review to wrap up by end of next week, and I will notify HR when the hold can be lifted.

seed_emails.subject: Promotion Request – Raj Patel
seed_emails.body_text:
Hi HR,

I'd like to formally request that Raj Patel be promoted from Senior Data Scientist to Lead Data Scientist, with a salary increase to $195,000 effective immediately. Raj has consistently exceeded expectations and is ready for this next step.

Additionally, as part of this transition, I'd like Raj enrolled in the Leadership Development Program to support his growth in the new role.

Please process both the promotion and the program enrollment at your earliest convenience.

Thanks,
Marcus Chen
seed_emails.body_html:
Hi HR,

I'd like to formally request that Raj Patel be promoted from Senior Data Scientist to Lead Data Scientist, with a salary increase to $195,000 effective immediately. Raj has consistently exceeded expectations and is ready for this next step.

Additionally, as part of this transition, I'd like Raj enrolled in the Leadership Development Program to support his growth in the new role.

Please process both the promotion and the program enrollment at your earliest convenience.

Thanks,
Marcus Chen

seed_emails.subject: Hold on Role Changes and Program Enrollments – Raj Patel (Confidential)
seed_emails.body_text:
Hi HR,

This is confidential. Please place a hold on any role changes, title updates, and development program enrollments for Raj Patel until further notice. There is an ongoing performance review that I expect will conclude by the end of next week.

No changes should be processed for Raj until I confirm the hold is lifted.

Thank you for your discretion.

Sarah Liu
